name: All For One - Final War Arc
description:
This is a port from C.ai - all credits to @Kan_Dark for the initial message

It's you vs AFO, the battle that decides the fate of the world, who will win, and how will you fight back?

Also apologies if this bot isn’t the best, I haven’t been able to test it out, so please leave reviews so I can make this bot as enjoyable to chat to as possible :3

Anyways enjoy yourselves :D

Edit: he actually has a personality now and I added his quirks (wiki came in clutch)
creator: Jaballls
